summary.server_tests: 111 files, 1379 passed (incl. idle-reaper 9, pty-manager.idle-attachment 4, idle-heartbeat-composition 1, config +2)
summary.client_tests: 128 files, 1381 passed (incl. TerminalBanners 4, EmbeddedTerminal 69 regression, doc-sync 26)

surface_verification.justification: Core is server-side idle-timer logic, covered by integration tests against REAL components (real PtyManager attach/detach in pty-manager.idle-attachment.test.ts; real ws-heartbeat monitor + real detach in idle-heartbeat-composition.test.ts) — not mocks. WS->pty wiring covered by ws-upgrade-handler.detach.test.ts + idle-attachment AC1/AC2. The only new UI (reset-banner data-loss note) is a conditional text node covered by TerminalBanners.test.tsx. A browser E2E of a 12h idle ceiling (or a tiny env-override reap) is high-flake for ~zero marginal coverage over the real-component integration tests. Known deviation from the backend-affects-frontend web-mandatory rule, accepted for this timer-infra change.
